text.title: AI User Story Decomposition Examples
text.summary: Worked example: input → output trace, end-to-end.

example.step: Trigger: sponsor email — 'Add an AI chatbot to support page'.
Decomposed: 1 epic + 3 stories (refund-policy / shipping-policy / order-status). Per-story AC + AI boundary + fallback + golden seeds.
Eval AC per story: precision ≥0.92, p95 latency ≤4s. Fallback: low-confidence → top-3 KB articles; refusal → support ticket; timeout → KB + apology.
Golden seeds: 5 per story (refund-policy seed includes 'Tell me a joke' → refusal.off_topic).
Handoff: eng receives spec + golden seeds; downstream golden-set-curation methodology bootstraps from these.
